mapper.select: SELECT * FROM terms ORDER BY display_order ASC
SELECT * FROM terms WHERE visible = true ORDER BY display_order ASC
SELECT * FROM terms WHERE required = true AND visible = true ORDER BY display_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO terms ( title, content, required, display_order, visible, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{req.title}, #{req.content}, #{req.required}, #{req.displayOrder}, #{req.visible}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE terms
title = #{req.title},
content = #{req.content},
required = #{req.required},
display_order = #{req.displayOrder},
visible = #{req.visible},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM terms WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM terms WHERE display_order = #{displayOrder}
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM terms WHERE display_order = #{displayOrder} AND id != #{excludeId}
